_comment: passgen configuration. 'presets' feeds -sp/--sub-preset: each preset is a list of {from, to} rules applied per-instance and case-sensitively (list 'a' and 'A' separately); rules may be many-to-one (i, I, l, L -> 1) or one-to-many (a -> 4 or @). 'sign_sets' feeds -ss/--sign-set: each entry is a list of punctuation characters appended/prepended/surrounding every word. The first entry in each section is the default when the flag is omitted (or given without a name, for -sp).
